name: ai-pr-compliance-mcp
description: MCP server exposing Confluence standards retrieval and PR compliance review tools.

tools.name: fetch_confluence_standards
tools.description: Pull engineering standards and technical documentation from Confluence spaces.

space_keys.description: Confluence space keys to fetch standards from (e.g. ['ENG', 'DEVOPS']).

extra_page_ids.description: Additional Confluence page IDs to always include.

tools.name: get_pr_files
tools.description: Retrieve the list of changed files in an Azure DevOps pull request.

tools.name: check_compliance
tools.description: Run GPT-powered compliance check on PR files against Confluence standards.

files.description: Map of file paths to their text content.

standards.description: Array of StandardsDocument objects as returned by fetch_confluence_standards.

tools.name: post_pr_review
tools.description: Post compliance findings as a comment thread on the PR and update PR status (blocks on FAIL).

report.description: ComplianceReport object as returned by check_compliance.

dry_run.description: When true, return comment Markdown without posting.
